prompt:
Global visual style for all panels: cinematic realistic live-action lyric video stills, photorealistic, natural human proportions, consistent art direction, consistent color grading, consistent lighting language, same visual universe across every panel, no mixed illustration styles, no anime, no cartoon, no 3D render, no text, no subtitles, no logos.
Create one exact 4x4 storyboard grid, 16 equal panels, no gaps, no borders, no labels, no text.
The whole image should be a horizontal 16:9 canvas, approximately 3840x2160 at 4K.
Each panel must be a 16:9 landscape frame, approximately 960x540 when cropped from a 4K 4x4 grid.
Panels are ordered left to right, top to bottom. Every panel is a landscape 16:9 frame. Empty unused panels must be pure white blank panels with no content.
一张包含精确4x4网格的图片，共16个大小相等的面板，面板之间没有间隙、没有边框、没有标签、没有文字。每个面板都必须是16:9的横图画幅。面板按从左到右、从上到下的顺序编号。未列出的面板全部渲染为纯白色空白，不含任何内容。

Panel 1: Cinematic illustration, landscape shot of a half-vacant studio interior, bare cement walls, clean-swept floor, long table parts, unopened light fixtures, tape marks on the wall, glass door with old key and black access fob hanging near it, afternoon warm light, transitional semi-open space.
Panel 2: Cinematic illustration, character shot of Rosa inside the unfinished studio, vivid orange wavy hair, metallic silver crop top beneath a cleaner dark jacket, futuristic cargo pants, climbing a short ladder to pin a plan sheet to the cement wall, jaw focused, afternoon warm light cutting across gray concrete.

Keep the main character consistent with this reference: fictional cyberpop female performer, vivid orange wavy hair, metallic silver crop top, loose futuristic cargo pants, chunky pale combat boots, wrist tech cuffs, bold confident stance, neon cyan and coral music-video lighting.
Panel 3: Cinematic illustration, character shot of Rosa near the studio glass door, orange hair lit by warm side light, silver crop top and wrist tech cuffs, attaching the old red-tied key to a larger black access fob, expression precise and relieved, unfinished workspace behind her.

Panel 6: Cinematic illustration, insert shot close-up of the black A5 notebook open on a black studio table, worn corners, receipts, plan sketches, and the half-gray half-gold concrete fragment placed beside it under warm desk lamp, no readable writing, no full person.
